title: Advance
description: A digital agency focused on SMBs, where I integrated advertising design, audiovisual content, organic strategy and paid media for more than 50 commercial accounts.
challenge: Serving more than 50 SMB accounts with very different design, content and media needs, while keeping quality and delivery times consistent in a remote work environment.
objective: Integrate advertising design, audiovisual content, organic strategy and paid media into a single workflow, aligning every deliverable with each account's commercial goals.
role: Advertising Designer, Media Buyer and Account Manager: I coordinated the creative flow of a seven-person team — from brief to creation, review and approval of deliverables — and advised clients directly.
strategy: Build repeatable processes for content production, quality control and deliverable organization, and plan campaigns on Meta Ads, Google Ads and TikTok Ads with segmentation and KPI analysis.

process.title: Brief & diagnosis
process.description: Per-account briefs: commercial goals, audience, and content and media needs.

process.title: Production & quality control
process.description: Creative team coordination with repeatable processes for creation, review and approval of deliverables.

process.title: Paid media & optimization
process.description: Campaign management on Meta, Google and TikTok Ads, with KPI tracking and segmentation adjustments.

results.summary: A work system capable of sustaining the creative and commercial operation of dozens of active accounts at once, with clear production, approval and media processes.

caseStudies.title: Eddie Bauer Costa Rica
caseStudies.tagline: Outdoor retail account · design, content & paid media
caseStudies.description: Creative management of the account within Advance: campaign pieces, stories, photography and video ads for the brand's promotions.
caseStudies.challenge: Sustaining the digital communication of an international outdoor brand in the Costa Rican market, with a constant flow of promotions, stories and seasonal campaigns.
caseStudies.objective: Producing content and paid media that convert: promotions, launches and commercial communication aligned with the store's sales goals.
caseStudies.role: Advertising Designer, Media Buyer and Account Manager: piece design, social content and management of the account's paid campaigns.
caseStudies.strategy: A system of repeatable pieces — feed, stories and video ads — that keeps the brand identity intact while pushing every promotion.

process.title: Brief & calendar
process.description: Planning promotions and seasonal content together with the client.

process.title: Piece production
process.description: Design of artwork, stories, photography and video ads under the brand's visual system.

process.title: Paid media & optimization
process.description: Meta Ads campaigns with performance tracking and segmentation adjustments.

results.summary: An account with constant, recognizable communication — from feed to paid media.

caseStudies.title: La Porketa
caseStudies.description: Creative management of the account within Advance: menu photography, story highlights and brand content for the pork and grill restaurant.
caseStudies.challenge: Translating a broad menu — dishes, burgers, cocktails and drinks — into an appetizing, consistent visual system that works on social media and at the point of sale.
caseStudies.objective: Presenting every dish with a coherent photographic and graphic language that sparks cravings and reinforces the brand's warm personality.
caseStudies.role: Advertising Designer and Account Manager: menu visual direction, product photography, story highlights and social content.
caseStudies.strategy: A repeatable system of pieces — menu, highlights and content — anchored in the red and cream palette and the little pig logo, so all communication is recognized instantly.

process.title: Visual system
process.description: Defining the grid, typography and photographic treatment of the menu from the brand identity.

process.title: Menu production
process.description: Photography and design of each dish, burger, cocktail and drink under the same language.

process.title: Content & highlights
process.description: Instagram story highlights and social content that organize the business's information.

caseStudies.title: 7Fishing
caseStudies.description: Advertising design for the fishing and adventure gear store: a line of promotional product pieces, with price and call to action, built to sell on social media and online.
caseStudies.challenge: Turning a catalog of outdoor gear — sunglasses, dry bags, coolers — into a recognizable line of ads that sells product by product without losing brand unity.
caseStudies.objective: Producing per-product advertising pieces, with price and call to action, that drive sales on social media and lead to the website and nationwide shipping.
caseStudies.role: Advertising Designer and Account Manager: art direction and design of the product ad line and the store's communication pieces.
caseStudies.strategy: An advertising system anchored in the brand's blue and the «one more cast» tagline: consistent composition of logo, cut-out product, headline, price and CTA, repeatable across the whole product line.

process.title: Advertising system
process.description: Defining the grid, typography and ad composition from 7Fishing's identity.

process.title: Product ads
process.description: Design of per-product pieces — sunglasses by destination, dry bags, coolers — with price and CTA.

process.title: Store communication
process.description: Website, shipping and contact pieces that complete the purchase journey.

caseStudies.title: 19°89° Arquitectura
caseStudies.description: Social media content design for the architecture studio: brand pieces and per-project campaigns that bring renders and built work into a single visual language.
caseStudies.challenge: Communicating architecture projects on social media so that the render, the built work and the brand voice live within one recognizable visual system.
caseStudies.objective: Positioning the studio with content that shows its purpose and its project portfolio, from render to photography of the finished build.
caseStudies.role: Advertising Designer and Account Manager: art direction and design of the brand content and per-project campaigns for social media.
caseStudies.strategy: A restrained editorial system — natural palette, firm typography and the «19°89°» seal — applied to brand-purpose pieces and per-project series that prioritize design (renders) before the real build.

process.title: Brand & purpose
process.description: Communication pieces expressing the studio's philosophy and services.

process.title: Per-project campaigns
process.description: Content series for Casa Cafetal, Kahwi and Tree Lodge: design renders and build photography.

process.title: Repeatable system
process.description: A consistent visual template that arranges render, real build and message in every post.

seo.title: Advance — Workspace · Adrián D. Bonilla
seo.description: Advertising design, media buying and management of 50+ SMB accounts at Advance, Ian Kupfer's agency.
